name: Statutory Limitation Period Suspension

eligibility.description: Triggered automatically upon the filing of an application for a Taxpayer Assistance Order under section 7811(a).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The running of the period of limitation for IRS collection or discovery actions is suspended while a TAO application is pending, providing the taxpayer more time to resolve disputes without immediate expiration of rights.
